function.name: get_flight_status
function.description: Get live flight status using aircraft callsign.
function.long_description: Retrieves real-time flight status information such as position, altitude, speed, and ground status using live aircraft data from an external aviation API.
example_user_queries: Check the status of flight AA100.
What is the current status of BA2490?
Show the latest status for UA884.
Tell me the status of flight AF011.
